items.text: Vastiri Outskirts → Mawdun Quarry / Mawdun Mine
Traitor's Passage: defeat Balbala, the Traitor
Keth → The Lost City / Buried Shrines
Titan Grotto: defeat Zalmarath, the Colossus
The Dreadnought: defeat Jamanra, the Abomination (Act boss)
Find a Barya and complete the Trial of the Sekhemas (1st Ascendancy)
Keth: defeat Kabala, Constrictor Queen → +2 weapon-set skill points
The Bone Pits: collect the Sun Clan Relic
Valley of the Titans: deliver Kabala + Sun Clan Relics → choose a permanent bonus (swappable)
Deshar: find the Final Letter, give to Shambrin → +2 weapon-set skill points
The Spires of Deshar: click the Sisters of Garukhan Shrine → +10% Lightning Resistance
